>Earned Income Credit
>Child tax credit
>100% healthcare subsidies
>Retirement savings credit
>Family Affordability Tax Credit (in my state)
>Utility credits
All of this and more is available if you are married with two kids and make $81k a year or less.
If you own a small business you can also contribute about $44k to a 401k, plus $14k to your IRA, every year tax free and it doesn't count towards your $81k income. The easy credits are worth about $23k a year so your actual income is $104k plus an additional $58k for retirement savings. Total tax burden on all that is around $6k; less if you are ballsy with distributions vs payroll.
Pay off house and cars then coast on minimum work, very little tax and get a bunch of benefits.

item.title: Canadian Mortgages are insane — 104 replies — 96.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Canadian Mortgages are insane

Open thread • Replies: 104 • Updated: 2026-06-21 11:23 UTC

OP

Anyone that bought homes over the last 10 years has no concept of the magnitude of the level of debt they have.

Imagine 400k to 900k mortgages on cookie cutter homes with no space between them. This is just fine in the mind of the average leaf.

Let me be clear, they are never going to pay it off. Never. They think because everyone else has a big ass mortgage that its fine. It took me 17 years just to pay down my 228k mortgage to 68k where it is now. How the fuck do these people think at 38 with a 500k mortgage they can pay it down by the time they retire? LMAO.

Fucking totally disconnected from reality. Millions of us.

item.title: UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD #1 — 99 replies — 15.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD #1

Open thread • Replies: 99 • Updated: 2026-06-21 05:56 UTC

OP

Brothers,

SpaceX has begun to rise. Its success or fall is of little importance to us in the short term.

In the meanwhile we must devise ways to gain a spot at the table with our kin in the six figure club.

I for one propose we spend our time learning a subject. Knowledge is the greatest wealth of all.

However, I would be remiss to not tell the truth that I haven't a clue what we should study.

So instead I suggest we create an eggregore for these threads. Others made monero-chan, bobo and sminem

I am thinking we create one based on a girl who would be willing to believe in us while we are poor and brave the pain throughout having to witness our more disappointing moments of action. Never losing faith in us, she is always there. Yes. This is how we shall spend our time.

At any rate, that is my suggestion for tonight's fun. I have to work in the morning so let's not get too rowdy. Take it or leave it. If you will take it, then be sure to double it and pass it on to the next anon.

Let us commence the general!

Come one, come all!

Early replies (first 3)

62373772
>>62373752
Jannies will surely delete these threads. Instead of creating an eggregore why not try something new and usurp an old one. It may be a derivative of one which has already been made.

62373798
>>62373772
Hello anon thanks for joining. You are poster #1. Your anime image shall be the eggregore. The "coffee" in the image is rather a good omen. We all know images with hot girls accompanied by a brief post on coffee attracts all the attention.

Now that matter is settled, help me add some links to this post here. This will be the header for the start of each general

Helpful links

>Educational materials
https://w9.kaijimanga.com/

>Looking to try the TCG route?
https://youtube.com/@alphainvestments69?si=tDAPjnRSZhyCIGP5

>Hidden in plain sight

>Games to strengthen you financial acumen
https://mahjongsoul.yo-star.com/

>Learn your from your betters
https://ia600609.us.archive.org/3/items/the-house-of-rothschild-ferguson-niall/The%20House%20of%20Rothschild%20-%20Ferguson%2C%20Niall.pdf

62392192
We'll tackle it in three's

These generals will undoubtedly attract enough attention to sustain it through the days but likely not enough to bump it off the catalog within a days time.

That being said, we'll choose three different Topics. That way we cover more ground, can reach a wider amount of anons and still have a small amount of topics to focus on.

So let's go with that for topic #1

62392203
For this subject, we'll naturally be investing into and researching various different companies. Photonics is a broad field. We have to narrow down and leave no stone unturned. We'll need to find the major players in the game, the future of the industry, and how it connects with the rest of the globalized sectors.

Furthermore, I will remind you. We will keep up with these topics for 90 days. We will then decide on something new(or perhaps continue if a breakthrough seemed close)

Starting tomorrow. I also ask that you refrain from masturbating. A 90 day nofap isn't much when you're past 19, however if we all combine our psychic/wishes/dreams/aspirations/desires/vril/chi/bloodline astral roads then we can unironically combine that entire nofap and share our semen through the collective unconscious and transmute our desire.

Photonics(The science and technology of generating, controlling, and manipulating light (photons).

How appropriate, let us leave the darkness and come into the light.

62392208
For the next topic...

62392211
eh, you don't need tips
just get MU leaps for 10k
it will turn to 50k+

62392213
I'll help bump from now on, I'm mostly in the background at the moment waiting for the right opportunity to onboard people.

62392239
>>62392213
Yeah eggregore anon, you did well. Honestly. Real well. Of all the first posts that could've been in my thread, I'm happy it was you. I wanted to talk about your draw idea. I have been thinking about it. I really have.

It hurts me to say this. I really am having reservations with it. I'll explain my reasoning.

It's too grand. It REALLY begs a lot from the average anon and the amount of anons who will likely frequent this general. Maybe one day this general takes off but right now it's still in the infancy stages. Let's take the photonics option as an example. To ask an anon to read an article and shill a stock here on photonics is a small ask.

To ask them to draw. Something that not even the 4chan board /ic/ is capable of doing, is a lot. That board is NOTORIOUS for the disparity of skill with its participants. If the K shaped economy was a board, that would be it.

/o/, most white men know how to fix cars, can afford a car and like fixing cars. Even if they have different quality of cars, they still all get under the hood

/diy/, while the wealth level does indeed vary, the amount of individuals who know how to plant, build, repair are all there. The subject matter for these two boards seems to repel idle minds who just nitpick other people's work. Even if you thought that mans house looks like shit, you inherently know that that man built a HOUSE

Same with /g/ where an extensive amount of people know how to program. Either due to school, work or just love for the hobby.

/ic/? All you need is a pencil or at the very least $100-$200 worth of supplies. Yet they all crab(ironic) on each other and they all know at the end of the day, it's just art. The other boards I mentioned have skills most people are forced to learn. Drawing isn't that skill.

I have one more post to say on this, give me 10 minutes before you respond

62392256
>>62374086
Seven figure net worth my life is fundamentally the same as when it was six or even five figures.

Aim for enough you're not stressing about $ don't do anything retarded and just live your life.

62392261
>>62392213
Another thing is that we want to leverage the amount of anons who will frequent these threads, and likely spend a limited time (emphasis on limited) and will only be able to make 4-5 posts before heading out.

Compare that to the amount of /ic/ anons you want to gather? A number of 10-15 draw anons is poor compared to the 50-60 unique anons who might post more on our topics of study and likely can push our plan further along

Drawing takes time and a lot of energy. We're just trying to get above $10k. If we had these /ic/ anons in here at best we'd have 4-5(AT BEST) working and 50-60 anons only able to really focus on 2/3 of the topics because one topic is gate kept for drawfags

Anon. If you want to make your own threads and own path, then go for it. I can't reasonably see it doing well here.

Finally, is the time. We've got 90 days before we switch topics. That time factor is important. We have to adapt. We can't waste a year dedicated to shrimp farming. 90 days. We have to move fast, the great reset is upon us. Drawing is antithetical to that 90 day margin.

I said what I mainly want to say. Don't feel the need to be polite. If you feel passionate about this and have to respond like a chansman then do that. I believe your plan could be done, just perhaps in another space. Not mine.

Thank you for showing me Gabriel Tenma

62392264
>>62392239
You could have picked anything other than drawing, even coding or vibe coding shit. Drawing has a horrible ROI unless you are a savant.

62392267
>>62392261

Let us take a moment to soak this in before I discuss the second. I am quite skilled in it, and I believe many of you are as well. I alluded to it briefly earlier.

62392272
>>62392264

62392301

That's what I'm trying to put together, art and the whole shitcoin element that involves the concept of "working for your bags" for an ROI after tokenizing a narrative, a meme, and in this case a hobby.

Pic related is a good example, someone liked this enough to steal it and started to use this drawing to shill their own shitcoin with a couple years ago.

>>62391779

In futures the open interest is matched. However this particular graph shows how many longs are vulnerable if it rises from the CURRENT PRICE. So many more people’s positions are in danger. The leverage matters. Contracts may balance. But if the longs are 10x leveraged and the short 2x. The map will look very “unbalanced” as the longs are far more fragile to movement. Exposure could be the same. But the margin the longs have could be 200k and the shorts 1mil in that case. Theres other complications but thats some basics.


There is only about $3B of leveraged long positions that would be liquidated below CURRENT PRICE.

Thers a much larger amount of short liquidation “fuel” above CURRENT PRICE.
